data.name: 封淫洞窟エロネスト
data.detailed_description:
This is an action game with some exploration elements, where you control the main character, a novice female adventurer Nirvana, as she completes the requests of the sorcerer Marie while being attacked by monsters. The dungeons that you have to conquer on request are sealed with monsters that feed on human females. Nirvana is normally protected by a shield, but if it takes damage, this will be broken and it will be restrained and drained of energy. If you remain unopposed in that state, your energy (EP) will decrease, and when this reaches zero, you will be defeated by the monster.

When “you lose” to the final boss, the gallery mode is released.

As you progress through the story, another dungeon will be unlocked. This is a random dungeon, and the area becomes larger as you progress. Three bosses will be released as you progress.

*This game is a set of the existing work Erotic Nest + DLC.

*This work supports PAD operation, but some operations may require keyboard and mouse operation.

*This game can be switched between Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, and Korean. Open the settings screen with the F1 or L3 button and switch from LANGUAGE.

※ A link to the uncensor patch is available on the website.

Characters

【Nirvana】

The protagonist.
At the request of the sorceress Marie, she sets out to explore the cave.
Although she has received a sacred baptism, she lacks battle experience and does not yet know the true terror of monsters.

【Merchant】

A demon who sells items inside the cave.

【Orc】

Known for powerful attacks and powerful thrusting.

【Succubus】

A monster sealed within the newly discovered labyrinth.
An incubus-like demon that has grown stronger by attacking many adventurers, and possesses a technique that steals the will of those it captures.

Status Effects and Scars of Defeat

Entering battle while suffering from status effects means certain defeat,
and all of Nirvana’s disgraceful battle records after defeat will be permanently recorded.

data.short_description: This is an action game where you control the main character, a novice female adventurer named Nirvana, as she completes the requests of the sorcerer Mary and is attacked by monsters.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: 2GHz以上
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2GB VRAM OpenGL ES 3.0 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: 3GHz以上
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 4GB VRAM OpenGL ES 3.0 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: 2GHz以上
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 2GB VRAM OpenGL ES 3.0 compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: 3GHz以上
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 4GB VRAM OpenGL ES 3.0 compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
